updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <selector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:color="#FFFFFFFF" android:state_checked="true" /> <item android:color="#99FFFFFF" /> </selector>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" android:viewportWidth="24" android:viewportHeight="24"> <!-- Lock icon --> <path android:fillColor="@android:color/white" android:pathData="M18,8h-1L17,6c0,-2.76 -2.24,-5 -5,-5S7,3.24 7,6v2L6,8c-1.1,0 -2,0.9 -2,2v10c0,1.1 0.9,2 2,2h12c1.1,0 2,-0.9 2,-2L20,10c0,-1.1 -0.9,-2 -2,-2zM12,17c-1.1,0 -2,-0.9 -2,-2s0.9,-2 2,-2 2,0.9 2,2 -0.9,2 -2,2zM15.1,8L8.9,8L8.9,6c0,-1.71 1.39,-3.1 3.1,-3.1 1.71,0 3.1,1.39 3.1,3.1v2z" /> </vector>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" android:viewportWidth="24" android:viewportHeight="24"> <!-- Wallpaper / activate icon: phone with image frame --> <path android:fillColor="@android:color/white" android:pathData="M17,1L7,1C5.9,1 5,1.9 5,3v18c0,1.1 0.9,2 2,2h10c1.1,0 2,-0.9 2,-2L19,3C19,1.9 18.1,1 17,1zM17,19L7,19L7,5h10v14zM9,13l1.5,2 2,-2.5L15,16L9,16z" /> </vector>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" android:viewportWidth="24" android:viewportHeight="24"> <!-- Home icon --> <path android:fillColor="@android:color/white" android:pathData="M10,20v-6h4v6h5v-8h3L12,3 2,12h3v8z" /> </vector>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" android:viewportWidth="24" android:viewportHeight="24"> <!-- Person / profiles icon --> <path android:fillColor="@android:color/white" android:pathData="M12,12c2.21,0 4,-1.79 4,-4s-1.79,-4 -4,-4 -4,1.79 -4,4 1.79,4 4,4zM12,14c-2.67,0 -8,1.34 -8,4v2h16v-2c0,-2.66 -5.33,-4 -8,-4z" /> </vector>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/container" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".views.activities.MainActivity"> </FrameLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/rootLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".views.activities.MainActivity">
<androidx.viewpager2.widget.ViewPager2 android:id="@+id/viewPager" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" />
<!-- Floating bottom navigation card --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/bottomNavCard" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="bottom|center_horizontal" android:layout_marginStart="20dp" android:layout_marginEnd="20dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="28dp" app:cardElevation="12dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/bottom_nav_background" app:strokeWidth="1dp" app:strokeColor="#33FFFFFF">
<com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottomNav" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@android:color/transparent" app:menu="@menu/bottom_nav_menu" app:labelVisibilityMode="labeled" app:itemIconTint="@color/bottom_nav_icon_tint" app:itemTextColor="@color/bottom_nav_icon_tint" app:itemTextAppearanceActive="@style/BottomNavTextAppearance" app:itemTextAppearanceInactive="@style/BottomNavTextAppearance" />
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/introduction1" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="36sp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/activate_button" android:layout_width="@dimen/activate_button_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/activate_button_size" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/activate_button_margin_top" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white_mod" android:text="@string/activate" app:strokeWidth="5dp" app:strokeColor="#AAA" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/activate_button_size">
<RelativeLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_centerInParent="true" android:text="@string/activate" android:textAlignment="center" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:textColor="#000" android:textSize="18sp" /> </RelativeLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Wallpaper assignment status section --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/wallpaper_status_title" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:alpha="0.7" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center">
<!-- Home screen status chip --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/homeStatusCard" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="1dp" app:strokeColor="#55FFFFFF" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF">
<TextView android:id="@+id/homeStatusText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="6dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/wallpaper_status_home_inactive" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Lock screen status chip --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/lockStatusCard" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="1dp" app:strokeColor="#55FFFFFF" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF">
<TextView android:id="@+id/lockStatusText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="6dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/wallpaper_status_lock_inactive" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</FrameLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/introduction1" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="36sp" />
<!-- Single smart activate button --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/activate_button" android:layout_width="@dimen/activate_button_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/activate_button_size" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/activate_button_margin_top" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white_mod" app:strokeWidth="5dp" app:strokeColor="#AAAAAA" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/activate_button_size" app:cardElevation="6dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/activateButtonIcon" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_nav_activate" android:tint="#222222" android:contentDescription="@string/activate" />
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/activateButtonLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/activate" android:textAlignment="center" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:textColor="#000" android:textSize="13sp" />
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- Contextual hint below the button --> <com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/activateHintText" android:layout_width="200dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="14dp" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/activate_hint_default" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="11sp" android:alpha="0.65" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.3" />
<!-- Wallpaper assignment status section --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/wallpaper_status_title" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:alpha="0.7" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/homeStatusCard" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="1dp" app:strokeColor="#55FFFFFF" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF">
<TextView android:id="@+id/homeStatusText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="6dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/wallpaper_status_home_inactive" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/lockStatusCard" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="1dp" app:strokeColor="#55FFFFFF" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF">
<TextView android:id="@+id/lockStatusText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="6dp" android:paddingBottom="6dp" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/wallpaper_status_lock_inactive" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</FrameLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="32dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_nav_profiles" android:alpha="0.5" android:contentDescription="@string/nav_profiles" />
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/profiles_coming_soon" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="16sp" android:alpha="0.7" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" />
</LinearLayout>
</FrameLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <RelativeLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto">
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/slideshowRecyclerId" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="4dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.floatingactionbutton.FloatingActionButton android:id="@+id/addPlaylistId" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:contentDescription="@string/add_wallpaper" app:fabSize="normal" app:elevation="8dp" app:borderWidth="0dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/material_green" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" android:layout_gravity="bottom|end" android:layout_alignParentEnd="true" android:layout_alignParentBottom="true" app:srcCompat="@drawable/add_white_24dp" />
</RelativeLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <RelativeLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto">
<!-- Wallpaper assignment status strip --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/statusBar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_alignParentTop="true" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center" android:paddingTop="12dp" android:paddingBottom="12dp" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/slideshowHomeStatusCard" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" app:cardCornerRadius="14dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="1dp" app:strokeColor="#55FFFFFF" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF"> <TextView android:id="@+id/slideshowHomeStatusText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp" android:paddingTop="5dp" android:paddingBottom="5dp" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/wallpaper_status_home_inactive" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/slideshowLockStatusCard" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardCornerRadius="14dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="1dp" app:strokeColor="#55FFFFFF" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF"> <TextView android:id="@+id/slideshowLockStatusText" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingStart="10dp" android:paddingEnd="10dp" android:paddingTop="5dp" android:paddingBottom="5dp" android:fontFamily="@font/montserrat" android:text="@string/wallpaper_status_lock_inactive" android:textSize="10sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/slideshowRecyclerId" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_below="@id/statusBar" android:padding="4dp"/>
<com.google.android.material.floatingactionbutton.FloatingActionButton android:id="@+id/addPlaylistId" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:contentDescription="@string/add_wallpaper" app:fabSize="normal" app:elevation="8dp" app:borderWidth="0dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/material_green" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" android:layout_gravity="bottom|end" android:layout_alignParentEnd="true" android:layout_alignParentBottom="true" app:srcCompat="@drawable/add_white_24dp" />
</RelativeLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="color_accent">#00809D</color> <color name="color_divider">#56FFFFFF</color>
<color name="white_mod">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="material_light">#B2B2B3</color>
<color name="semi_transparent">#99212121</color> <color name="material_green">#00e676</color>
<color name="material_black">#030408</color> <color name="material_dark_light">#616161</color>
<color name="switch_track_color">#80FFFFFF</color> <!-- semi-transparent white --> <color name="switch_thumb_color">@color/color_accent</color> <color name="switch_thumb_tint_disabled">#B0B0B0</color> <!-- accent color --> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="color_accent">#00809D</color> <color name="color_divider">#56FFFFFF</color>
<color name="white_mod">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="material_light">#B2B2B3</color>
<color name="semi_transparent">#99212121</color> <color name="material_green">#00e676</color>
<color name="material_black">#030408</color> <color name="material_dark_light">#616161</color>
<color name="switch_track_color">#80FFFFFF</color> <!-- semi-transparent white --> <color name="switch_thumb_color">@color/color_accent</color> <color name="switch_thumb_tint_disabled">#B0B0B0</color> <!-- accent color -->
<!-- Bottom navigation bar --> <color name="bottom_nav_background">#E0232323</color> <color name="bottom_nav_indicator">#3300809D</color> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources>
<style name="AppThemeBase" parent="Theme.Material3.DynamicColors.Dark.NoActionBar"> <item name="colorPrimaryDark">@android:color/transparent</item> <item name="colorPrimary">@android:color/transparent</item> <item name="colorAccent">@color/color_accent</item> <item name="materialAlertDialogTheme">@style/ThemeOverlay.App.MaterialAlertDialog</item> <item name="android:windowActionBar">false</item> <item name="android:windowNoTitle">true</item> <item name="android:actionBarStyle">@style/TransparentActionBar</item> </style>
<style name="TransparentActionBar" parent="Widget.AppCompat.ActionBar"> <item name="android:background">@android:color/transparent</item> <item name="background">@android:color/transparent</item> <item name="elevation">0dp</item> </style>
<style name="AppTheme" parent="AppThemeBase"> </style>
<style name="AppTheme.Transparent"> <item name="android:windowBackground">@android:color/transparent</item> <item name="android:windowShowWallpaper">true</item> </style>
<!-- <style name="TitleTextAppearance" parent="TextAppearance.Widget.AppCompat.Toolbar.Title">--> <!-- <item name="android:fontFamily">@font/montserrat</item>--> <!-- </style>-->
<style name="Montserrat_Text" parent="@android:style/TextAppearance.Widget.TabWidget"> <item name="android:fontFamily">@font/montserrat</item> <item name="android:textStyle">bold</item> </style>
<style name="MaterialAlertDialog.App.Title.Text" parent="MaterialAlertDialog.Material3.Title.Text"> <item name="android:textColor">@color/white_mod</item> <item name="android:fontFamily">@font/montserrat</item> </style>
<style name="Widget.App.Button" parent="Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton.Dialog"> <item name="android:textColor">@color/white_mod</item> <item name="android:fontFamily">@font/montserrat</item> </style>
<style name="ThemeOverlay.App.MaterialAlertDialog" parent="ThemeOverlay.Material3.MaterialAlertDialog"> <item name="materialAlertDialogTitleTextStyle">@style/MaterialAlertDialog.App.Title.Text</item> <item name="buttonBarPositiveButtonStyle">@style/Widget.App.Button</item> <item name="buttonBarNegativeButtonStyle">@style/Widget.App.Button</item> </style>
<style name="CustomMaterialSwitch" parent="Widget.Material3.CompoundButton.MaterialSwitch"> <item name="trackTint">@color/switch_track_tint</item> <item name="trackDecorationTint">@color/material_dark_light</item> <item name="thumbTint">@color/switch_thumb_tint</item> </style>
</resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources>
<style name="AppThemeBase" parent="Theme.Material3.DynamicColors.Dark.NoActionBar"> <item name="colorPrimaryDark">@android:color/transparent</item> <item name="colorPrimary">@android:color/transparent</item> <item name="colorAccent">@color/color_accent</item> <item name="materialAlertDialogTheme">@style/ThemeOverlay.App.MaterialAlertDialog</item> <item name="android:windowActionBar">false</item> <item name="android:windowNoTitle">true</item> <item name="android:actionBarStyle">@style/TransparentActionBar</item> </style>
<style name="TransparentActionBar" parent="Widget.AppCompat.ActionBar"> <item name="android:background">@android:color/transparent</item> <item name="background">@android:color/transparent</item> <item name="elevation">0dp</item> </style>
<style name="AppTheme" parent="AppThemeBase"> </style>
<style name="AppTheme.Transparent"> <item name="android:windowBackground">@android:color/transparent</item> <item name="android:windowShowWallpaper">true</item> </style>
<!-- <style name="TitleTextAppearance" parent="TextAppearance.Widget.AppCompat.Toolbar.Title">--> <!-- <item name="android:fontFamily">@font/montserrat</item>--> <!-- </style>-->
<style name="Montserrat_Text" parent="@android:style/TextAppearance.Widget.TabWidget"> <item name="android:fontFamily">@font/montserrat</item> <item name="android:textStyle">bold</item> </style>
<style name="MaterialAlertDialog.App.Title.Text" parent="MaterialAlertDialog.Material3.Title.Text"> <item name="android:textColor">@color/white_mod</item> <item name="android:fontFamily">@font/montserrat</item> </style>
<style name="Widget.App.Button" parent="Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton.Dialog"> <item name="android:textColor">@color/white_mod</item> <item name="android:fontFamily">@font/montserrat</item> </style>
<style name="ThemeOverlay.App.MaterialAlertDialog" parent="ThemeOverlay.Material3.MaterialAlertDialog"> <item name="materialAlertDialogTitleTextStyle">@style/MaterialAlertDialog.App.Title.Text</item> <item name="buttonBarPositiveButtonStyle">@style/Widget.App.Button</item> <item name="buttonBarNegativeButtonStyle">@style/Widget.App.Button</item> </style>
<!-- Bottom navigation bar: Montserrat font --> <style name="BottomNavTextAppearance" parent="TextAppearance.MaterialComponents.Caption"> <item name="android:fontFamily">@font/montserrat</item> <item name="fontFamily">@font/montserrat</item> <item name="android:textSize">11sp</item> </style>
<style name="CustomMaterialSwitch" parent="Widget.Material3.CompoundButton.MaterialSwitch"> <item name="trackTint">@color/switch_track_tint</item> <item name="trackDecorationTint">@color/material_dark_light</item> <item name="thumbTint">@color/switch_thumb_tint</item> </style>
</resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <wallpaper xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:thumbnail="@drawable/thumbnail" />
